calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jun-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: DFDS Transport (US), Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Amy Julian, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: La Vita E. Bella, Inc. as follows:
Damages $58,796.22
Prejudgment Interest $7,845.57
Attorney's Fees $800.00
Costs $375.00, for a total of $67,816.79
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-09-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2007 Continued To Apr-27-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
